# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist file types using trusted server-side validation, not just filename extensions.
- Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside directly executable/public paths when appropriate.
- Apply size limits, content checks, archive safety checks, and image/document processing safeguards.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust only the original filename or extension.
- Do not store uploads in a public/executable path under a user-controlled name.
- Do not allow unlimited file sizes or dangerous archive extraction behavior.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User File Uploads
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents securely for membership sites.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Secure Dev
 * License: GPL v2 or later
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Secure_User_File_Uploads {

    const UPLOAD_SUBDIR = 'user-files';
    const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10 MB
    const MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION = 4096;

    private static $allowed_types = [
        'image/jpeg'      => 'jpg',
        'image/png'       => 'png',
        'image/gif'       => 'gif',
        'image/webp'      => 'webp',
        'application/pdf' => 'pdf',
        'application/msword' => 'doc',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => 'docx',
        'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text' => 'odt',
        'text/plain'      => 'txt',
    ];

    private static $image_types = [
        'image/jpeg',
        'image/png',
        'image/gif',
        'image/webp',
    ];

    private static $archive_extensions = [
        'zip', 'tar', 'gz', 'bz2', 'rar', '7z', 'tgz',
    ];

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', [$this, 'init']);
        add_action('admin_menu', [$this, 'add_admin_menu']);
        add_action('show_user_profile', [$this, 'render_upload_form']);
        add_action('edit_user_profile', [$this, 'render_upload_form']);
        add_action('personal_options_update', [$this, 'handle_upload']);
        add_action('edit_user_profile_update', [$this, 'handle_upload']);
        add_action('wp_ajax_sufu_delete_file', [$this, 'ajax_delete_file']);
        add_shortcode('user_upload_form', [$this, 'shortcode_upload_form']);
        add_action('wp_ajax_sufu_frontend_upload', [$this, 'handle_frontend_upload']);
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue_admin_styles']);
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue_frontend_styles']);
    }

    public function init() {
        $this->ensure_upload_directory();
    }

    /**
     * Ensure the upload directory exists with proper protections.
     */
    private function ensure_upload_directory() {
        $upload_dir = $this->get_upload_base_path();

        if (!file_exists($upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($upload_dir);
        }

        // Prevent direct access and script execution
        $htaccess_path = $upload_dir . '/.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_path)) {
            $htaccess_content = "# Deny direct access to all files\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "Options -Indexes -ExecCGI\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "RemoveHandler .php .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml .pht .shtml .shtm\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "RemoveType .php .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml .pht .shtml .shtm\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\\.(php|php3|php4|php5|php7|php8|phtml|pht|shtml|shtm|cgi|pl|py|rb|sh|bash|exe|bat|cmd|com|vbs|js|jsp|asp|aspx)$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "\n# Force download for all files\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<IfModule mod_headers.c>\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Header set Content-Disposition attachment\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</IfModule>\n";
            file_put_contents($htaccess_path, $htaccess_content);
        }

        // Also add an index.php to prevent directory listing
        $index_path = $upload_dir . '/index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_path)) {
            file_put_contents($index_path, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get the base upload path for user files.
     */
    private function get_upload_base_path() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        return trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_SUBDIR;
    }

    /**
     * Get the user-specific upload directory path.
     */
    private function get_user_upload_path($user_id) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        $path = trailingslashit($this->get_upload_base_path()) . $user_id;

        if (!file_exists($path)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($path);

            // Add index.php in user directory too
            $index_path = $path . '/index.php';
            if (!file_exists($index_path)) {
                file_put_contents($index_path, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
            }
        }

        return $path;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the MIME type of the uploaded file using server-side detection (finfo).
     */
    private function validate_file_type($tmp_path, $original_name) {
        // Check if file exists and is an uploaded file
        if (!is_uploaded_file($tmp_path)) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_upload', __('Invalid upload detected.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Detect MIME type using finfo (server-side, not trusting client)
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $detected_mime = $finfo->file($tmp_path);

        if ($detected_mime === false) {
            return new WP_Error('mime_detection_failed', __('Could not determine file type.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check against allowlist
        if (!array_key_exists($detected_mime, self::$allowed_types)) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'disallowed_type',
                sprintf(
                    __('File type "%s" is not allowed. Allowed types: %s', 'sufu'),
                    esc_html($detected_mime),
                    implode(', ', array_values(self::$allowed_types))
                )
            );
        }

        // Additional check: verify the original extension isn't trying to disguise a dangerous file
        $original_ext = strtolower(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));

        // Block archive files entirely (no extraction allowed)
        if (in_array($original_ext, self::$archive_extensions, true)) {
            return new WP_Error('archive_blocked', __('Archive files are not allowed.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Block double extensions (e.g., file.php.jpg)
        $name_without_ext = pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
        if (preg_match('/\.(php|phtml|pht|php3|php4|php5|php7|php8|cgi|pl|py|rb|sh|bash|exe|bat|cmd|com|vbs|js|jsp|asp|aspx|shtml|shtm)/i', $name_without_ext)) {
            return new WP_Error('dangerous_filename', __('Filename contains a disallowed extension.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check that the detected MIME matches what the extension would suggest
        $expected_ext = self::$allowed_types[$detected_mime];
        $acceptable_extensions = $this->get_extensions_for_mime($detected_mime);

        if (!in_array($original_ext, $acceptable_extensions, true)) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'extension_mismatch',
                __('File extension does not match the detected file content.', 'sufu')
            );
        }

        return [
            'mime_type' => $detected_mime,
            'extension' => $expected_ext,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Get acceptable extensions for a given MIME type.
     */
    private function get_extensions_for_mime($mime) {
        $map = [
            'image/jpeg'      => ['jpg', 'jpeg'],
            'image/png'       => ['png'],
            'image/gif'       => ['gif'],
            'image/webp'      => ['webp'],
            'application/pdf' => ['pdf'],
            'application/msword' => ['doc'],
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => ['docx'],
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text' => ['odt'],
            'text/plain'      => ['txt'],
        ];

        return isset($map[$mime]) ? $map[$mime] : [];
    }

    /**
     * Validate file content for additional safety checks.
     */
    private function validate_file_content($tmp_path, $mime_type) {
        // For images, validate using getimagesize and reprocess
        if (in_array($mime_type, self::$image_types, true)) {
            return $this->validate_image_content($tmp_path, $mime_type);
        }

        // For PDFs, do basic content validation
        if ($mime_type === 'application/pdf') {
            return $this->validate_pdf_content($tmp_path);
        }

        // For text files, check for embedded code
        if ($mime_type === 'text/plain') {
            return $this->validate_text_content($tmp_path);
        }

        // For Office documents, do basic validation
        if (in_array($mime_type, [
            'application/msword',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
        ], true)) {
            return $this->validate_document_content($tmp_path, $mime_type);
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Validate and sanitize image files.
     */
    private function validate_image_content($tmp_path, $mime_type) {
        // Verify it's actually an image
        $image_info = @getimagesize($tmp_path);
        if ($image_info === false) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_image', __('File is not a valid image.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check dimensions
        if ($image_info[0] > self::MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION || $image_info[1] > self::MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'image_too_large',
                sprintf(
                    __('Image dimensions exceed the maximum of %dx%d pixels.', 'sufu'),
                    self::MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION,
                    self::MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION
                )
            );
        }

        // Check for PHP code embedded in image metadata/content
        $file_content = file_get_contents($tmp_path);
        if ($file_content === false) {
            return new WP_Error('read_error', __('Could not read uploaded file.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check for embedded PHP/script tags
        $dangerous_patterns = [
            '/<\?php/i',
            '/<\?=/i',
            '/<script\b/i',
            '/<%/i',
        ];

        foreach ($dangerous_patterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $file_content)) {
                return new WP_Error('malicious_content', __('File contains potentially malicious content.', 'sufu'));
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Reprocess an image to strip metadata and potential malicious content.
     */
    private function reprocess_image($file_path, $mime_type) {
        if (!function_exists('wp_get_image_editor')) {
            return true; // Skip if image editor not available
        }

        $editor = wp_get_image_editor($file_path);
        if (is_wp_error($editor)) {
            return true; // Skip reprocessing if editor fails
        }

        // Save the image back, which strips EXIF and other metadata
        $result = $editor->save($file_path, $mime_type);
        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            return true; // Skip if save fails
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Validate PDF content.
     */
    private function validate_pdf_content($tmp_path) {
        $handle = fopen($tmp_path, 'rb');
        if ($handle === false) {
            return new WP_Error('read_error', __('Could not read uploaded file.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check PDF magic bytes
        $header = fread($handle, 5);
        fclose($handle);

        if ($header !== '%PDF-') {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_pdf', __('File is not a valid PDF document.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Scan for potentially dangerous content in PDF
        $content = file_get_contents($tmp_path);
        $dangerous_patterns = [
            '/\/JavaScript\s/i',
            '/\/JS\s/i',
            '/\/Launch\s/i',
            '/\/OpenAction\s/i',
            '/\/AA\s/i',
            '/<\?php/i',
        ];

        foreach ($dangerous_patterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $content)) {
                return new WP_Error('dangerous_pdf', __('PDF contains potentially dangerous content (JavaScript or auto-actions).', 'sufu'));
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Validate text file content.
     */
    private function validate_text_content($tmp_path) {
        $content = file_get_contents($tmp_path);
        if ($content === false) {
            return new WP_Error('read_error', __('Could not read uploaded file.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check for embedded code
        $dangerous_patterns = [
            '/<\?php/i',
            '/<\?=/i',
            '/<script\b/i',
            '/<%/i',
            '/<\?xml.*<!ENTITY/si', // XXE
        ];

        foreach ($dangerous_patterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $content)) {
                return new WP_Error('malicious_text', __('Text file contains potentially malicious content.', 'sufu'));
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Validate document content (DOC, DOCX, ODT).
     */
    private function validate_document_content($tmp_path, $mime_type) {
        // For DOCX and ODT (ZIP-based formats), verify the ZIP structure
        if (in_array($mime_type, [
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
        ], true)) {
            if (class_exists('ZipArchive')) {
                $zip = new ZipArchive();
                $result = $zip->open($tmp_path, ZipArchive::RDONLY);

                if ($result !== true) {
                    return new WP_Error('invalid_document', __('Document file appears to be corrupted.', 'sufu'));
                }

                // Check for zip bombs and dangerous entries
                $total_uncompressed = 0;
                $max_uncompressed = 100 * 1024 * 1024; // 100 MB limit for uncompressed content
                $max_entries = 10000;

                if ($zip->numFiles > $max_entries) {
                    $zip->close();
                    return new WP_Error('zip_bomb', __('Document contains too many entries.', 'sufu'));
                }

                for ($i = 0; $i < $zip->numFiles; $i++) {
                    $stat = $zip->statIndex($i);

                    if ($stat === false) {
                        continue;
                    }

                    $total_uncompressed += $stat['size'];

                    // Check compression ratio (zip bomb detection)
                    if ($stat['comp_size'] > 0 && ($stat['size'] / $stat['comp_size']) > 100) {
                        $zip->close();
                        return new WP_Error('zip_bomb', __('Document has suspicious compression ratio.', 'sufu'));
                    }

                    // Check for path traversal in entry names
                    $entry_name = $stat['name'];
                    if (strpos($entry_name, '..') !== false || strpos($entry_name, '/') === 0 || strpos($entry_name, '\\') === 0) {
                        $zip->close();
                        return new WP_Error('path_traversal', __('Document contains suspicious file paths.', 'sufu'));
                    }

                    // Check for executable files inside the document
                    $entry_ext = strtolower(pathinfo($entry_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
                    $dangerous_exts = ['php', 'exe', 'bat', 'cmd', 'sh', 'bash', 'cgi', 'pl', 'py', 'rb', 'jsp', 'asp', 'aspx'];
                    if (in_array($entry_ext, $dangerous_exts, true)) {
                        $zip->close();
                        return new WP_Error('dangerous_entry', __('Document contains potentially dangerous embedded files.', 'sufu'));
                    }
                }

                if ($total_uncompressed > $max_uncompressed) {
                    $zip->close();
                    return new WP_Error('zip_bomb', __('Document uncompressed size exceeds the limit.', 'sufu'));
                }

                $zip->close();
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Generate a safe server-side filename.
     */
    private function generate_safe_filename($extension, $file_type) {
        $prefix = 'file';
        if (in_array($file_type, self::$image_types, true)) {
            $prefix = 'img';
        } elseif ($file_type === 'application/pdf') {
            $prefix = 'pdf';
        } elseif (strpos($file_type, 'document') !== false || strpos($file_type, 'msword') !== false || strpos($file_type, 'opendocument') !== false) {
            $prefix = 'doc';
        }

        // Generate a unique, non-guessable filename
        $unique_id = bin2hex(random_bytes(16));
        $timestamp = time();

        return sprintf('%s_%s_%d.%s', $prefix, $unique_id, $timestamp, $extension);
    }

    /**
     * Process and store the uploaded file.
     */
    private function process_upload($file, $user_id, $file_category = 'document') {
        // Check for upload errors
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $error_messages = [
                UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => __('File exceeds the server upload size limit.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => __('File exceeds the form upload size limit.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => __('File was only partially uploaded.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => __('No file was uploaded.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => __('Server missing temporary folder.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => __('Failed to write file to disk.', 'sufu'),
                UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => __('Upload stopped by a server extension.', 'sufu'),
            ];

            $message = isset($error_messages[$file['error']])
                ? $error_messages[$file['error']]
                : __('Unknown upload error.', 'sufu');

            return new WP_Error('upload_error', $message);
        }

        // Check file size
        if ($file['size'] > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'file_too_large',
                sprintf(
                    __('File size exceeds the maximum of %s.', 'sufu'),
                    size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE)
                )
            );
        }

        if ($file['size'] === 0) {
            return new WP_Error('empty_file', __('Uploaded file is empty.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Validate file type (server-side MIME detection)
        $type_result = $this->validate_file_type($file['tmp_name'], $file['name']);
        if (is_wp_error($type_result)) {
            return $type_result;
        }

        $mime_type = $type_result['mime_type'];
        $extension = $type_result['extension'];

        // Validate file content
        $content_result = $this->validate_file_content($file['tmp_name'], $mime_type);
        if (is_wp_error($content_result)) {
            return $content_result;
        }

        // Generate safe filename (server-side, not user-controlled)
        $safe_filename = $this->generate_safe_filename($extension, $mime_type);

        // Get user upload directory
        $user_dir = $this->get_user_upload_path($user_id);
        $destination = trailingslashit($user_dir) . $safe_filename;

        // Verify the destination is within the expected directory (prevent path traversal)
        $real_user_dir = realpath($user_dir);
        if ($real_user_dir === false) {
            return new WP_Error('directory_error', __('Upload directory does not exist.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Move the uploaded file
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            return new WP_Error('move_failed', __('Failed to save uploaded file.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Verify the file ended up where we expected
        $real_destination = realpath($destination);
        if ($real_destination === false || strpos($real_destination, $real_user_dir) !== 0) {
            @unlink($destination);
            return new WP_Error('path_traversal', __('File path validation failed.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Set restrictive file permissions
        chmod($destination, 0644);

        // Reprocess images to strip metadata
        if (in_array($mime_type, self::$image_types, true)) {
            $this->reprocess_image($destination, $mime_type);
        }

        // Store file metadata in user meta
        $file_meta = [
            'filename'      => $safe_filename,
            'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($file['name']),
            'mime_type'     => $mime_type,
            'size'          => filesize($destination),
            'category'      => sanitize_text_field($file_category),
            'uploaded_at'   => current_time('mysql'),
            'uploaded_by'   => get_current_user_id(),
        ];

        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = [];
        }

        $file_id = wp_generate_uuid4();
        $user_files[$file_id] = $file_meta;
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', $user_files);

        // If this is a profile picture, update the profile picture meta
        if ($file_category === 'profile_picture') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_profile_picture', $file_id);
        }

        return [
            'file_id'  => $file_id,
            'metadata' => $file_meta,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Serve a file securely (through PHP, not direct access).
     */
    public function serve_file() {
        if (!isset($_GET['sufu_file']) || !isset($_GET['sufu_nonce'])) {
            return;
        }

        $file_id = sanitize_text_field($_GET['sufu_file']);
        $user_id = isset($_GET['sufu_user']) ? absint($_GET['sufu_user']) : get_current_user_id();

        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_GET['sufu_nonce'], 'sufu_serve_file_' . $file_id)) {
            wp_die(__('Security check failed.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Check permissions
        if (!$this->can_access_user_files($user_id)) {
            wp_die(__('You do not have permission to access this file.', 'sufu'));
        }

        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files) || !isset($user_files[$file_id])) {
            wp_die(__('File not found.', 'sufu'));
        }

        $file_meta = $user_files[$file_id];
        $file_path = trailingslashit($this->get_user_upload_path($user_id)) . $file_meta['filename'];

        // Verify path
        $real_path = realpath($file_path);
        $real_base = realpath($this->get_upload_base_path());

        if ($real_path === false || $real_base === false || strpos($real_path, $real_base) !== 0) {
            wp_die(__('File not found.', 'sufu'));
        }

        if (!file_exists($file_path) || !is_readable($file_path)) {
            wp_die(__('File not found.', 'sufu'));
        }

        // Serve the file
        $mime_type = $file_meta['mime_type'];

        // Force download for non-image types
        $is_image = in_array($mime_type, self::$image_types, true);

        header('Content-Type: ' . $mime_type);
        header('Content-Length: ' . filesize($file_path));
        header('X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff');
        header('Content-Security-Policy: default-src \'none\'');

        if ($is_image) {
            header('Content-Disposition: inline; filename="' . sanitize_file_name($file_meta['original_name']) . '"');
        } else {
            header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . sanitize_file_name($file_meta['original_name']) . '"');
        }

        // Prevent caching of sensitive files
        header('Cache-Control: private, no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
        header('Pragma: no-cache');
        header('Expires: 0');

        readfile($file_path);
        exit;
    }

    /**
     * Check if current user can access another user's files.
     */
    private function can_access_user_files($target_user_id) {
        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();

        if ($current_user_id === 0) {
            return false;
        }

        // Users can access their own files
        if ($current_user_id === $target_user_id) {
            return true;
        }

        // Admins can access any user's files
        if (current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Get the secure URL for a file.
     */
    public function get_file_url($file_id, $user_id) {
        $nonce = wp_create_nonce('sufu_serve_file_' . $file_id);
        return add_query_arg([
            'sufu_file'  => $file_id,
            'sufu_user'  => $user_id,
            'sufu_nonce' => $nonce,
        ], home_url('/'));
    }

    /**
     * Render the upload form on user profile pages.
     */
    public function render_upload_form($user) {
        if (!$this->can_access_user_files($user->ID)) {
            return;
        }

        $user_files = get_user_meta($user->ID, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = [];
        }

        $profile_picture_id = get_user_meta($user->ID, '_sufu_profile_picture', true);
        $max_size_formatted = size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE);
        $allowed_extensions = implode(', ', array_unique(array_values(self::$allowed_types)));

        ?>
        <h2><?php esc_html_e('Profile Picture & Documents', 'sufu'); ?></h2>

        <table class="form-table sufu-upload-table">
            <tr>
                <th><label for="sufu_profile_picture"><?php esc_html_e('Profile Picture', 'sufu'); ?></label></th>
                <td>
                    <?php if ($profile_picture_id && isset($user_files[$profile_picture_id])): ?>
                        <div class="sufu-current-avatar">
                            <img src="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($profile_picture_id, $user->ID)); ?>"
                                 alt="<?php esc_attr_e('Profile Picture', 'sufu'); ?>"
                                 style="max-width: 150px; max-height: 150px; border-radius: 50%;" />
                            <br />
                            <label>
                                <input type="checkbox" name="sufu_remove_avatar" value="1" />
                                <?php esc_html_e('Remove current profile picture', 'sufu'); ?>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                    <input type="file" name="sufu_profile_picture" id="sufu_profile_picture"
                           accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,image/webp" />
                    <p class="description">
                        <?php printf(
                            esc_html__('Upload a profile picture. Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP. Max size: %s.', 'sufu'),
                            esc_html($max_size_formatted)
                        ); ?>
                    </p>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <th><label for="sufu_document"><?php esc_html_e('Upload Document', 'sufu'); ?></label></th>
                <td>
                    <input type="file" name="sufu_document" id="sufu_document" />
                    <p class="description">
                        <?php printf(
                            esc_html__('Upload a document. Accepted formats: %s. Max size: %s.', 'sufu'),
                            esc_html($allowed_extensions),
                            esc_html($max_size_formatted)
                        ); ?>
                    </p>
                    <label for="sufu_document_label"><?php esc_html_e('Document Label:', 'sufu'); ?></label>
                    <input type="text" name="sufu_document_label" id="sufu_document_label"
                           placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('e.g., ID Card, Certificate', 'sufu'); ?>"
                           class="regular-text" />
                </td>
            </tr>
        </table>

        <?php if (!empty($user_files)): ?>
            <h3><?php esc_html_e('Uploaded Files', 'sufu'); ?></h3>
            <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped sufu-files-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('File', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Type', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Category', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Size', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Uploaded', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Actions', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php foreach ($user_files as $file_id => $meta): ?>
                        <tr id="sufu-file-<?php echo esc_attr($file_id); ?>">
                            <td>
                                <?php if (in_array($meta['mime_type'], self::$image_types, true)): ?>
                                    <img src="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($file_id, $user->ID)); ?>"
                                         alt="" style="max-width: 50px; max-height: 50px; vertical-align: middle;" />
                                <?php endif; ?>
                                <?php echo esc_html($meta['original_name']); ?>
                            </td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['mime_type']); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $meta['category']))); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($meta['size'])); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['uploaded_at']); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($file_id, $user->ID)); ?>"
                                   class="button button-small" target="_blank">
                                    <?php esc_html_e('View', 'sufu'); ?>
                                </a>
                                <button type="button" class="button button-small button-link-delete sufu-delete-file"
                                        data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file_id); ?>"
                                        data-user-id="<?php echo esc_attr($user->ID); ?>"
                                        data-nonce="<?php echo esc_attr(wp_create_nonce('sufu_delete_file_' . $file_id)); ?>">
                                    <?php esc_html_e('Delete', 'sufu'); ?>
                                </button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('.sufu-delete-file').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                if (!confirm('<?php echo esc_js(__('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'sufu')); ?>')) {
                    return;
                }

                var $btn = $(this);
                var fileId = $btn.data('file-id');
                var userId = $btn.data('user-id');
                var nonce = $btn.data('nonce');

                $.post(ajaxurl, {
                    action: 'sufu_delete_file',
                    file_id: fileId,
                    user_id: userId,
                    _wpnonce: nonce
                }, function(response) {
                    if (response.success) {
                        $('#sufu-file-' + fileId).fadeOut(300, function() { $(this).remove(); });
                    } else {
                        alert(response.data.message || '<?php echo esc_js(__('Error deleting file.', 'sufu')); ?>');
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }

    /**
     * Handle file upload from profile page.
     */
    public function handle_upload($user_id) {
        if (!$this->can_access_user_files($user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        // Check nonce (WordPress handles this for profile updates)
        if (!current_user_can('edit_user', $user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        $errors = [];

        // Handle profile picture removal
        if (isset($_POST['sufu_remove_avatar']) && $_POST['sufu_remove_avatar'] === '1') {
            $this->remove_profile_picture($user_id);
        }

        // Handle profile picture upload
        if (isset($_FILES['sufu_profile_picture']) && $_FILES['sufu_profile_picture']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
            $result = $this->process_upload($_FILES['sufu_profile_picture'], $user_id, 'profile_picture');
            if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                $errors[] = $result->get_error_message();
            }
        }

        // Handle document upload
        if (isset($_FILES['sufu_document']) && $_FILES['sufu_document']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
            $category = 'document';
            if (!empty($_POST['sufu_document_label'])) {
                $category = sanitize_text_field($_POST['sufu_document_label']);
            }

            $result = $this->process_upload($_FILES['sufu_document'], $user_id, $category);
            if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                $errors[] = $result->get_error_message();
            }
        }

        if (!empty($errors)) {
            // Store errors in transient for display
            set_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user_id, $errors, 60);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Remove a user's profile picture.
     */
    private function remove_profile_picture($user_id) {
        $profile_picture_id = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_profile_picture', true);
        if ($profile_picture_id) {
            $this->delete_file($profile_picture_id, $user_id);
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_profile_picture');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a file.
     */
    private function delete_file($file_id, $user_id) {
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files) || !isset($user_files[$file_id])) {
            return new WP_Error('file_not_found', __('File not found.', 'sufu'));
        }

        $file_meta = $user_files[$file_id];
        $file_path = trailingslashit($this->get_user_upload_path($user_id)) . $file_meta['filename'];

        // Verify path is within expected directory
        $real_path = realpath($file_path);
        $real_base = realpath($this->get_upload_base_path());

        if ($real_path !== false && $real_base !== false && strpos($real_path, $real_base) === 0) {
            @unlink($file_path);
        }

        // Remove from meta
        unset($user_files[$file_id]);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', $user_files);

        // If this was the profile picture, clear that meta too
        $profile_picture_id = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_profile_picture', true);
        if ($profile_picture_id === $file_id) {
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_profile_picture');
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * AJAX handler for file deletion.
     */
    public function ajax_delete_file() {
        $file_id = isset($_POST['file_id']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['file_id']) : '';
        $user_id = isset($_POST['user_id']) ? absint($_POST['user_id']) : 0;

        if (empty($file_id) || empty($user_id)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => __('Invalid request.', 'sufu')]);
        }

        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['_wpnonce'], 'sufu_delete_file_' . $file_id)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => __('Security check failed.', 'sufu')]);
        }

        if (!$this->can_access_user_files($user_id)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => __('Permission denied.', 'sufu')]);
        }

        $result = $this->delete_file($file_id, $user_id);
        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => $result->get_error_message()]);
        }

        wp_send_json_success(['message' => __('File deleted successfully.', 'sufu')]);
    }

    /**
     * Frontend shortcode for upload form.
     */
    public function shortcode_upload_form($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>' . esc_html__('Please log in to upload files.', 'sufu') . '</p>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'allow_profile_picture' => 'yes',
            'allow_documents'       => 'yes',
            'show_files'            => 'yes',
        ], $atts, 'user_upload_form');

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = [];
        }

        $max_size_formatted = size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE);
        $allowed_extensions = implode(', ', array_unique(array_values(self::$allowed_types)));

        // Check for messages
        $messages = get_transient('sufu_frontend_messages_' . $user_id);
        delete_transient('sufu_frontend_messages_' . $user_id);

        $errors = get_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user_id);
        delete_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user_id);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="sufu-frontend-upload">
            <?php if (!empty($messages)): ?>
                <div class="sufu-messages sufu-success">
                    <?php foreach ((array) $messages as $msg): ?>
                        <p><?php echo esc_html($msg); ?></p>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php if (!empty($errors)): ?>
                <div class="sufu-messages sufu-error">
                    <?php foreach ((array) $errors as $err): ?>
                        <p><?php echo esc_html($err); ?></p>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="sufu-upload-form">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('sufu_frontend_upload', 'sufu_frontend_nonce'); ?>

                <?php if ($atts['allow_profile_picture'] === 'yes'): ?>
                    <div class="sufu-field">
                        <label for="sufu_fe_profile_picture">
                            <?php esc_html_e('Profile Picture', 'sufu'); ?>
                        </label>
                        <input type="file" name="sufu_profile_picture" id="sufu_fe_profile_picture"
                               accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,image/webp" />
                        <span class="sufu-help">
                            <?php printf(
                                esc_html__('JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP. Max: %s', 'sufu'),
                                esc_html($max_size_formatted)
                            ); ?>
                        </span>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <?php if ($atts['allow_documents'] === 'yes'): ?>
                    <div class="sufu-field">
                        <label for="sufu_fe_document">
                            <?php esc_html_e('Upload Document', 'sufu'); ?>
                        </label>
                        <input type="file" name="sufu_document" id="sufu_fe_document" />
                        <span class="sufu-help">
                            <?php printf(
                                esc_html__('Accepted: %s. Max: %s', 'sufu'),
                                esc_html($allowed_extensions),
                                esc_html($max_size_formatted)
                            ); ?>
                        </span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="sufu-field">
                        <label for="sufu_fe_document_label">
                            <?php esc_html_e('Document Label', 'sufu'); ?>
                        </label>
                        <input type="text" name="sufu_document_label" id="sufu_fe_document_label"
                               placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('e.g., ID Card, Certificate', 'sufu'); ?>" />
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <div class="sufu-field">
                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="sufu_frontend_upload" />
                    <button type="submit" class="sufu-submit-btn">
                        <?php esc_html_e('Upload', 'sufu'); ?>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>

            <?php if ($atts['show_files'] === 'yes' && !empty($user_files)): ?>
                <div class="sufu-files-list">
                    <h3><?php esc_html_e('Your Files', 'sufu'); ?></h3>
                    <table class="sufu-files-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('File', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Category', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Size', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Date', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Actions', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($user_files as $file_id => $meta): ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['original_name']); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $meta['category']))); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($meta['size'])); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($meta['uploaded_at']))); ?></td>
                                    <td>
                                        <a href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($file_id, $user_id)); ?>"
                                           target="_blank">
                                            <?php esc_html_e('View', 'sufu'); ?>
                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    /**
     * Handle frontend upload form submission.
     */
    public function handle_frontend_upload() {
        // Also handle via direct form POST (non-AJAX)
        if (!isset($_POST['sufu_frontend_nonce'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['sufu_frontend_nonce'], 'sufu_frontend_upload')) {
            wp_die(__('Security check failed.', 'sufu'));
        }

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die(__('You must be logged in.', 'sufu'));
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        // Rate limiting: max 10 uploads per hour
        $upload_count_key = 'sufu_upload_count_' . $user_id;
        $upload_count = get_transient($upload_count_key);
        if ($upload_count === false) {
            $upload_count = 0;
        }

        if ($upload_count >= 10) {
            set_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user_id, [__('Upload rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.', 'sufu')], 60);
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url());
            exit;
        }

        $errors = [];
        $successes = [];

        // Handle profile picture upload
        if (isset($_FILES['sufu_profile_picture']) && $_FILES['sufu_profile_picture']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
            $result = $this->process_upload($_FILES['sufu_profile_picture'], $user_id, 'profile_picture');
            if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                $errors[] = __('Profile Picture: ', 'sufu') . $result->get_error_message();
            } else {
                $successes[] = __('Profile picture uploaded successfully.', 'sufu');
                $upload_count++;
            }
        }

        // Handle document upload
        if (isset($_FILES['sufu_document']) && $_FILES['sufu_document']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
            $category = 'document';
            if (!empty($_POST['sufu_document_label'])) {
                $category = sanitize_text_field($_POST['sufu_document_label']);
            }

            $result = $this->process_upload($_FILES['sufu_document'], $user_id, $category);
            if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                $errors[] = __('Document: ', 'sufu') . $result->get_error_message();
            } else {
                $successes[] = __('Document uploaded successfully.', 'sufu');
                $upload_count++;
            }
        }

        // Update rate limit counter
        set_transient($upload_count_key, $upload_count, HOUR_IN_SECONDS);

        if (!empty($errors)) {
            set_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user_id, $errors, 60);
        }
        if (!empty($successes)) {
            set_transient('sufu_frontend_messages_' . $user_id, $successes, 60);
        }

        wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url());
        exit;
    }

    /**
     * Add admin menu for managing user files.
     */
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_management_page(
            __('User File Uploads', 'sufu'),
            __('User Files', 'sufu'),
            'manage_options',
            'sufu-user-files',
            [$this, 'render_admin_page']
        );
    }

    /**
     * Render admin management page.
     */
    public function render_admin_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(__('Access denied.', 'sufu'));
        }

        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php esc_html_e('User File Uploads', 'sufu'); ?></h1>

            <?php
            $users_with_files = get_users([
                'meta_key'     => '_sufu_files',
                'meta_compare' => 'EXISTS',
            ]);

            if (empty($users_with_files)):
            ?>
                <p><?php esc_html_e('No users have uploaded files yet.', 'sufu'); ?></p>
            <?php else: ?>
                <?php foreach ($users_with_files as $user): ?>
                    <?php
                    $user_files = get_user_meta($user->ID, '_sufu_files', true);
                    if (!is_array($user_files) || empty($user_files)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    ?>
                    <h2>
                        <?php echo esc_html($user->display_name); ?>
                        (<?php echo esc_html($user->user_email); ?>)
                        - <?php echo count($user_files); ?> <?php esc_html_e('file(s)', 'sufu'); ?>
                    </h2>
                    <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Preview', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Original Name', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Type', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Category', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Size', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Uploaded', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                                <th><?php esc_html_e('Actions', 'sufu'); ?></th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($user_files as $file_id => $meta): ?>
                                <tr id="sufu-file-<?php echo esc_attr($file_id); ?>">
                                    <td>
                                        <?php if (in_array($meta['mime_type'], self::$image_types, true)): ?>
                                            <img src="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($file_id, $user->ID)); ?>"
                                                 alt="" style="max-width: 60px; max-height: 60px;" />
                                        <?php else: ?>
                                            <span class="dashicons dashicons-media-document"></span>
                                        <?php endif; ?>
                                    </td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['original_name']); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['mime_type']); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $meta['category']))); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($meta['size'])); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($meta['uploaded_at']); ?></td>
                                    <td>
                                        <a href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_file_url($file_id, $user->ID)); ?>"
                                           class="button button-small" target="_blank">
                                            <?php esc_html_e('View', 'sufu'); ?>
                                        </a>
                                        <button type="button" class="button button-small button-link-delete sufu-delete-file"
                                                data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file_id); ?>"
                                                data-user-id="<?php echo esc_attr($user->ID); ?>"
                                                data-nonce="<?php echo esc_attr(wp_create_nonce('sufu_delete_file_' . $file_id)); ?>">
                                            <?php esc_html_e('Delete', 'sufu'); ?>
                                        </button>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                <?php endforeach; ?>

                <script>
                jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
                    $('.sufu-delete-file').on('click', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (!confirm('<?php echo esc_js(__('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'sufu')); ?>')) {
                            return;
                        }

                        var $btn = $(this);
                        var fileId = $btn.data('file-id');
                        var userId = $btn.data('user-id');
                        var nonce = $btn.data('nonce');

                        $.post(ajaxurl, {
                            action: 'sufu_delete_file',
                            file_id: fileId,
                            user_id: userId,
                            _wpnonce: nonce
                        }, function(response) {
                            if (response.success) {
                                $('#sufu-file-' + fileId).fadeOut(300, function() { $(this).remove(); });
                            } else {
                                alert(response.data.message || '<?php echo esc_js(__('Error deleting file.', 'sufu')); ?>');
                            }
                        });
                    });
                });
                </script>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    /**
     * Enqueue admin styles.
     */
    public function enqueue_admin_styles($hook) {
        if ($hook === 'tools_page_sufu-user-files' || $hook === 'profile.php' || $hook === 'user-edit.php') {
            wp_add_inline_style('wp-admin', '
                .sufu-upload-table .sufu-current-avatar { margin-bottom: 10px; }
                .sufu-files-table img { border-radius: 4px; }
            ');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Enqueue frontend styles.
     */
    public function enqueue_frontend_styles() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        wp_add_inline_style('wp-block-library', '
            .sufu-frontend-upload { max-width: 700px; margin: 20px 0; }
            .sufu-upload-form .sufu-field { margin-bottom: 15px; }
            .sufu-upload-form label { display: block; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; }
            .sufu-upload-form .sufu-help { display: block; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; margin-top: 3px; }
            .sufu-submit-btn { background: #0073aa; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; }
            .sufu-submit-btn:hover { background: #005a87; }
            .sufu-messages { padding: 10px 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 4px; }
            .sufu-success { background: #d4edda; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; color: #155724; }
            .sufu-error { background: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; color: #721c24; }
            .sufu-files-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 10px; }
            .sufu-files-table th, .sufu-files-table td { padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd; text-align: left; }
            .sufu-files-table th { background: #f5f5f5; }
        ');
    }

    /**
     * Ensure the profile form has enctype for file uploads.
     */
    public static function add_enctype_to_profile_form() {
        echo ' enctype="multipart/form-data"';
    }

    /**
     * Display upload errors on profile page.
     */
    public function display_profile_errors($user) {
        $errors = get_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user->ID);
        if (!empty($errors)) {
            delete_transient('sufu_upload_errors_' . $user->ID);
            foreach ($errors as $error) {
                echo '<div class="notice notice-error"><p>' . esc_html($error) . '</p></div>';
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle file serving on template_redirect.
     */
    public function handle_file_serving() {
        if (isset($_GET['sufu_file'])) {
            $this->serve_file();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle frontend form submission on init.
     */
    public function handle_frontend_form_submission() {
        if (isset($_POST['action']) && $_POST['action'] === 'sufu_frontend_upload' && isset($_POST['sufu_frontend_nonce'])) {
            $this->handle_frontend_upload();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get the total storage used by a user.
     */
    public function get_user_storage_used($user_id) {
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            return 0;
        }

        $total = 0;
        foreach ($user_files as $meta) {
            $total += isset($meta['size']) ? $meta['size'] : 0;
        }

        return $total;
    }

    /**
     * Check if user has exceeded their storage quota.
     */
    private function check_storage_quota($user_id) {
        $max_storage = apply_filters('sufu_max_user_storage', 50 * 1024 * 1024); // 50 MB default
        $used = $this->get_user_storage_used($user_id);

        if ($used >= $max_storage) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'storage_exceeded',
                sprintf(
                    __('Storage quota exceeded. You have used %s of %s.', 'sufu'),
                    size_format($used),
                    size_format($max_storage)
                )
            );
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Get the maximum number of files a user can upload.
     */
    private function check_file_count_limit($user_id) {
        $max_files = apply_filters('sufu_max_user_files', 50);
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_sufu_files', true);

        if (is_array($user_files) && count($user_files) >= $max_files) {
            return new WP_Error(
                'file_limit_exceeded',
                sprintf(
                    __('Maximum file limit of %d reached. Please delete some files first.', 'sufu'),
                    $max_files
